summary: Iteration 6 (Site duplication + Multi-domain management) — ALL tests pass. Backend: 8/8 iteration_6 pytest (duplicate preserves 50 fresh steps with only #1 unlocked and progress=0; copy_products=true clones all products as status='draft' with cloned_from set; copy_products=false → empty catalog; cross-user duplicate denied 403; GET /domain returns CNAME instructions {type:CNAME,name,value,ttl:3600}; POST /domain rejects 5 invalid hostnames (empty, spaces, URL form, >253 chars, leading hyphen) with 400/422; valid domain persists with verified=false; /domain/verify returns 200 verified=false with clear French reason for test domains (no real DNS); DELETE /domain unsets fields; cross-site uniqueness returns 409; public resolver returns 404 for unverified domains — correct security posture). Iteration 5 regression: 15/15 still pass (meta/blocks, ads_copy FR+DE with real Claude Sonnet 4.5, 15 phases, etc). Frontend E2E as Concepteur: login OK; /sites page lists 8 sites; SiteDetail shows 4 blocks + 15 phases (regression); Duplicate button opens duplicate-modal with dup-name pre-filled '<original> (copie)' and dup-copy-products checkbox; Domaine button opens domain-modal with full CNAME instructions; domain-save persists, domain-verify returns 'Aucun CNAME vers la cible Concept Factory n'a été détecté.' (expected), domain-clear resets; Ads Copy link (ads-copy-link) regression OK; Full duplicate flow confirmed: dup-confirm navigates to new site detail URL /sites/<new-id> showing name 'UI-Clone-92441' with 0/50 progress, 0% avancement, BLOC 1/4 Template & Boutique, all 20 visible Block-1 steps VERROUILLÉE.
critical_code_review_comments: routes/domain.py _resolve_cname catches bare Exception — fine for non-blocking DNS, but log level 'debug' means silent failures in production. Consider logger.warning for unexpected exception types (only NoAnswer/NXDOMAIN/DNSException should be silent). Low priority.

routes/domain.py _normalize_domain strips protocol/path but does NOT strip trailing dot (FQDN form 'example.com.' would pass _is_valid_hostname via regex? Actually regex requires ending char to be alphanumeric so trailing dot is rejected — OK). However strips www per comment but code only rstrips '/'; the 'strip leading www.' comment is misleading — the code doesn't actually strip www. Consider removing the comment or implementing it.

routes/duplicate.py always sets new site status='active' regardless of source. If source was 'paused' or 'archived' the clone still goes live. Minor product decision — flag to confirm with product owner.

routes/duplicate.py: no transactional rollback — if insert_many(products) fails after site+steps insert, the new site exists with steps but incomplete catalog. Safe enough since user can re-duplicate, but a try/except cleanup would be cleaner.

routes/domain.py CNAME_TARGET uses FRONTEND_URL hostname — correct for preview env. In production, ensure PUBLIC_CNAME_TARGET env is set to the production storefront edge (e.g., stores.conceptfactory.fr) rather than the internal preview host.

server.py partial unique index on sites.custom_domain — confirm partialFilterExpression is applied (so sites without custom_domain don't collide on null). Not verified in this run but test_domain_uniqueness passes which is indirect evidence.
test_credentials: concepteur@conceptfactory.fr / Concepteur2026! and admin@conceptfactory.fr / Factory2026! (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md) — both valid and working.
seed_data_creation: Created transient test data during pytest (sites with 'Clone-', 'Nude-', 'Other-' prefixes + temporary test-*.example.com domains). Also created 1 UI clone 'UI-Clone-92441' during Playwright E2E. All cleaned up via admin DELETE /api/sites/{id} at end of testing (verified: total sites back to 10).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 6 regression suite at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration6.py (8 tests, ~3.5s, no LLM calls). Iteration 5 regression at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration5.py (15 tests, ~47s including 2 live Claude calls). Testids for iter6 modals: SiteDetail triggers duplicate-site, manage-domain; DuplicateModal: duplicate-modal, dup-name, dup-copy-products, dup-confirm, dup-modal-close; DomainModal: domain-modal, domain-input, domain-save, domain-verify, domain-clear, domain-msg, domain-modal-close. For domain verify to return verified=true, real CNAME record must point to CNAME_TARGET (senior-france.preview.emergentagent.com in this env) — expect verified=false in CI.
rca of the issue: No issues found. All acceptance criteria from the review request met: duplicate creates site with 50 fresh steps + progress=0 + duplicated_from set; product cloning flag works both ways (draft status + cloned_from on clones); cross-user 403; orders/ads_copy/validations correctly excluded from duplication (verified by re-fetching orders/ads list on new site returns empty); domain CRUD + verify + public resolver all behave per spec; 409 uniqueness conflict enforced; 404 on unverified public resolve is correct security behavior; frontend modals fully integrated and navigate correctly post-duplicate.
